inputs.label: Target Dive Depth
inputs.businessContext: Planned maximum depth of the dive, affecting inert gas loading and decompression risk.

businessContext_i18n.en: Planned maximum depth of the dive, affecting inert gas loading and decompression risk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dalışın planlanan maksimum derinliği, inert gaz yüklenmesini ve dekompresyon riskini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geplante maximale Tiefe des Tauchgangs, beeinflusst Inertgasbeladung und Dekompressionsrisiko.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur maximale prévue de la plongée, affectant la charge en gaz inerte et le risque de décompression.
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad máxima planificada de la inmersión, que afecta la carga de gas inerte y el riesgo de descompresión.

inputs.label: Target Partial Pressure O₂
inputs.businessContext: Safe maximum partial pressure of oxygen to avoid CNS toxicity (1.4–1.6 atm).

businessContext_i18n.en: Safe maximum partial pressure of oxygen to avoid CNS toxicity (1.4–1.6 atm).
businessContext_i18n.tr: CNS toksisitesini önlemek için güvenli maksimum kısmi oksijen basıncı (1.4–1.6 atm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherer maximaler Sauerstoffpartialdruck zur Vermeidung von ZNS-Toxizität (1,4–1,6 atm).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression partielle maximale sûre d'oxygène pour éviter la toxicité du SNC (1,4–1,6 atm).
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión parcial máxima segura de oxígeno para evitar toxicidad del SNC (1.4–1.6 atm).

inputs.label: Nitrox O₂ Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Oxygen percentage in the breathing gas mix, determines depth limits and decompression efficiency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Oxygen percentage in the breathing gas mix, determines depth limits and decompression efficiency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Solunum gazı karışımındaki oksijen yüzdesi, derinlik limitlerini ve dekompresyon verimliliğini belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sauerstoffanteil im Atemgasgemisch, bestimmt Tiefengrenzen und Dekompressionseffizienz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'oxygène dans le mélange gazeux respiratoire, détermine les limites de profondeur et l'efficacité de décompression.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de oxígeno en la mezcla de gas respirable, determina los límites de profundidad y la eficiencia de descompresión.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
